task: Build a premium FrankX work subpage for Property Intelligence OS

references_translated: Vercel and Linear restraint, density, and dark technical clarity
Top agency pattern: one strong first-viewport object, no copied references
FrankX brand pack: black glass, graphite, signal lines, direct commercial copy
failure_modes: claims of automation beyond owner approval

phase_2_concept.dominant_visual_idea: Owner command surface for one property with renter, listing, support, and approval states.
phase_2_concept.motion_job: Reveal operating surfaces and signal liveness without making motion essential.
phase_2_concept.asset_strategy: No generated images. Use UI evidence as the visual artifact.

notes: Strong first read and specific product mechanism.
Motion is scoped and reduced-motion aware.
Desktop and mobile screenshot inspection passed without text overlap or horizontal overflow.

phase_5_iterations.change: Renamed the link-map eyebrow to Related FrankX surfaces to make the cross-site relationship explicit.
phase_5_iterations.reason: The user asked for the page to link to the broader FrankX estate and example experience.

phase_5_iterations.change: Moved the full Property Intelligence OS experience from /work to /work/property-intelligence-os and restored /work as the engagement hub with a featured-system entry link.
phase_5_iterations.reason: The work hub should index systems and engagements; the full property OS experience needs its own canonical subpage.

checks: no horizontal overflow on 1440px desktop or 390px mobile
/work keeps the original work hub headline
/work does not contain the Property Intelligence OS hero
/work/property-intelligence-os contains the Property Intelligence OS hero
no horizontal overflow on 1440px desktop or 390px mobile
no browser console issues on checked live routes
